title: Fix out of memory in dfg-optimize stage
body:
Any ideas how to debug / triage the following elaboration error? I have added --debug and --gdbbt, but no backtrace was printed.

```
%Warning-CASEINCOMPLETE: clocking_mode_obj.sv:137:9: Case values incompletely covered (example pattern 0x2)
                                                                     : ... note: In instance '$unit.clocking_mode_obj'
-node: CASE 0xa41cd9ec0 <e9931066> {vm137aj}
  137 |         case (cmn_setup)
      |         ^~~~
                         verif/pma/rtl/tb_define.sv:25:1: ... note: In file included from 'tb_define.sv'
                         verif/pma/rtl/apb_agent.sv:6:1: ... note: In file included from 'apb_agent.sv'
- V3Ast.cpp:1397:     Dumping elab/obj_dir/Vtb_top_043_case.tree
- V3Task.cpp:2069:    taskAll:
verilator_bin_dbg(34412,0x1fb750800) malloc: Failed to allocate segment from range group - out of space
%Error: Verilator threw signal 9
%Error: Command Failed verilator_bin --cc --timing -sv --timescale 1ps/1fs --threads 1 --Mdir <output_dir> --top-module tb_top -O1 --relative-includes --output-split 2000 -Wno-fatal -Wno-ASSIGNIN -DVERILATOR=1 --debug --gdbbt -f <rtl_filelist> -f <tb_filelist> -DVERILATOR_SIM
make: *** [elab] Error 137
```

I am running this on a Mac with 24 GB of memory. I could try a larger machine, but I think this should be enough. When I simulate this design with a Cocotb testbench top, its OK. This leads me to believe its an issue in elaborating some part of the SystemVerilog testbench.

I am running Verilator 5.041 devel rev v5.040-300-g794247450
